Helen Grant MP Celebrates Child Cruelty Register Becoming Law

Thursday, 30 April, 2026
Today is a truly historic day for child protection in this country. Last night, the Crime and Policing Bill received Royal Assent and is now an Act of Parliament. This means the Child Cruelty Register provisions have become law. I do want to take this opportunity to celebrate two extraordinary people – Paula and Tony Hudgell. Tony suffered unimaginable cruelty as a baby, losing both of his legs...
